title: Onna kyûketsuki
writer: Katsuyoshi Nakatsu, Shin Nakazawa, Sotoo Tachibana
actors: Shigeru Amachi, Takashi Wada, Junko Ikeuchi
plot: A woman who's been missing for twenty years suddenly turns up alive, and looking not a day older than when she vanished. When her daughter sees a painting of a woman identical to her mother, her reporter boyfriend helps her track ...
